seniority.level: Senior IC / Staff (Program Manager with 7+ years)
level_signals: 7+ years of experience in program management, business operations, management consulting or a related discipline
Make C-suite level recommendations and drive decisions
Develop a Programs Center of Excellence, providing guidance, consulting, and coaching to peers

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience working in a sales and marketing organization
7+ years of experience in program management, business operations, management consulting or a related discipline
A strong track record of delivering global, complex programs with multiple constituents in a changing, ambiguous environment end-to-end
Has an enthusiastic "roll up your sleeves" mentality
Works well under pressure, with a high degree of adaptability and flexibility in a fast paced, rapidly changing environment.
The ability to diagnose, simplify and structure problems and solutions while having command of "the details"
Excellent analytical, presentation, and communication experience, influencing across all levels from front lines to C-Suite. You set a high-bar in terms of communication effectiveness

Someone who demonstrates leadership qualities throughout their work – taking ownership of challenges, selflessly supporting their colleagues, and setting the standard for quality in their deliverables

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Comfort operating with incomplete data and adapting / re-prioritizing activities as business needs change
Deep problem solving and analysis experience (solving business problems - commercial, operational, financial) in a Sales-oriented environment
A growth mindset and innate curiosity where every interaction is an opportunity to learn and improve (yourself, and those around you)

scope.surface: GTM Strategic Programs — incubation programs, PMO, and XFN program management for Go-to-Market teams
primary_metrics_inferred: Successful delivery of large-scale GTM programs end-to-end
Revenue team improvement outcomes (strategy, people, process, technology)
core_responsibilities: Be accountable for building and driving large-scale programs end-to-end, and be directly responsible for marshaling the cross-functional support and resources needed to accomplish your goals
Manage directly (or coordinate) the 'full-stack' of change management activities across stakeholder engagement and creating champions, messaging/communication planning, support and enablement
Develop strong collaborative relationships with key stakeholders across Stripe across levels and functions
Work cross-functionally to identify improvement opportunities for the Revenue teams spanning strategy, people, process, and technology
Develop a Programs Center of Excellence, providing guidance, consulting, and coaching to peers and others on partner teams
Seamlessly prioritize among various projects and synthesize data to guide/support strategy and decision
Make C-suite level recommendations and drive decisions, where necessary

green_flags: Clear articulation of program scope and team purpose
Explicit encouragement to apply if minimum requirements are met ('you are encouraged to apply')
Preferred qualifications explicitly labeled as bonus, not requirement
Role sits at high-visibility intersection of GTM strategy and execution
red_flags: No compensation or salary range disclosed
No location or remote/hybrid policy stated — candidates cannot assess fit
Broad scope ('full stack' program management) may indicate resource constraints or undefined role boundaries

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years requirement and C-suite interaction signals)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
location.type (set to 'unclear' — not stated in JD)
ambiguities: The JD mentions candidates from 'hypergrowth technology/GTM org or strategic consulting background' as ideal, but these are framed in the 'What you'll do' section rather than as a formal requirement — treated as a hard signal but not extracted as a standalone must-have since they overlap with the 7+ year requirement.
No office location or remote policy is stated anywhere in the JD — location.type is set to 'unclear'.
